property.name: candidate_policy
property.value: {'optimized': OptimizationConfig(attention_weight_dtype=DataType.BFLOAT4_B, gate_up_weight_dtype=DataType.BFLOAT4_B, down_weight_dtype=DataType.BFLOAT4_B, attention_math_fidelity=MathFidelity.LoFi, gate_up_math_fidelity=MathFidelity.LoFi, down_math_fidelity=MathFidelity.LoFi, residual_cores=32, qkv_cores=16, output_cores=32, gate_up_cores=32, down_cores=32, qkv_in0_block_w=None, output_in0_block_w=None, gate_up_in0_block_w=4, down_in0_block_w=7, sdpa_grid=(8, 8), explicit_sdpa_program_config=False, explicit_sdpa_compute_kernel=False, prefill_grid=(8, 8), prefill_gate_up_in0_block_w=4, packed_gate_up=False, packed_decode_gate_up=False, decode_matmul_strategy='dram_sharded', fused_cache_update=False, advisor_gate_up_grid=(11, 10), advisor_gate_up_in0_block_w=2, advisor_gate_up_per_core_n=9, advisor_gate_up_out_subblock_w=3, advisor_down_grid=(11, 6), advisor_down_in0_block_w=4, advisor_down_per_core_n=4, advisor_down_out_subblock_w=4, advisor_exact_residual_chain=False)}
